context: Tests whether the agent explains Core NFC background tag reading using URI records and universal links, not bundle IDs or arbitrary content types.

checklist.name: URI record
checklist.description: Says background tag reading looks for an NDEF URI record.

checklist.name: Well-known U
checklist.description: Specifies `.nfcWellKnown` type name format and type `U` for the URI record.

checklist.name: First URI
checklist.description: States that if multiple URI records exist, iOS uses the first URI record.

checklist.name: Universal links
checklist.description: Uses universal links for app-specific background tag routing.

checklist.name: Associated domains
checklist.description: Requires Associated Domains configuration for the universal link domain.

checklist.name: Reject custom schemes
checklist.description: States that custom URL schemes are not supported for background tag reading.

checklist.name: Reject bundle/content
checklist.description: Rejects routing by bundle ID or arbitrary NDEF content type.

checklist.name: Empty guard
checklist.description: Includes a guard for the empty NDEF payload returned by non-background user activities.
